signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg surges to favorite in NBA Rookie of the Year odds after 96-point weekend** | YES | HIGH

signals.headline: US-Iran Diplomatic Meeting Market Seen as Mispriced by Some | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Diplomatic Meeting Market Seen as Mispriced by Some | NO | LOW confidence**  
"No Meeting before May 11" leads at 33%, with "May 1" at 16%; X chatter calls it undervalued amid stalled talks, but lacks whale confirmation or fresh announcements[5]. No resolved events like confirmations shift odds today[5].
